title: dimocarpus gardneri
intro: Dimocarpus gardneri, also known as the Malay apple or Java apple, is a species of fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Dimocarpus gardneri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of consuming Dimocarpus gardneri include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Dimocarpus gardneri include making a tea from its leaves and fruit to help alleviate fever and respiratory issues.
